name: SpiritScape
short_description: Team up, explore haunted realms, and banish spirits in this cooperative ghost-hunting experience. Uncover supernatural mysteries with friends in this strategic multiplayer game.
detailed_description:
Spiritscape is a multiplayer ghost hunting and banishment game that thrusts players into a haunted realm, armed with specialized tools to uncover and expel malevolent spirits. Team up with friends for an intense cooperative experience as you explore haunted locations, communicate with ghosts, and strategically banish entities.

NOTE: SpiritScape is currently in a Beta (early access) state, with many unfinished and unimplemented features.
